mapper.select: SELECT user_interactions.resource_id AS refid, NULL AS tablename, NULL AS name, NULL AS picture, user_interactions.interaction_type AS type FROM user_interactions 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment}
SELECT user_interactions.resource_id AS refid, NULL AS tablename, NULL AS name, NULL AS picture, user_interactions.interaction_type AS type FROM user_interactions 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment}

SELECT user_interactions.id, user_interactions.created_at AS addtime, user_interactions.user_id AS userid, user_interactions.resource_id AS refid, user_interactions.interaction_type AS type FROM user_interactions 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment}

SELECT user_interactions.id, user_interactions.created_at AS addtime, user_interactions.user_id AS userid, user_interactions.resource_id AS refid, user_interactions.interaction_type AS type FROM user_interactions 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment}
